inline_comments.message:
URL should be relative to the super project origin (doc) without ssh, lfid, and port. Reference info at https://git-scm.com/docs/gitmodules

etsicatalog is inconsistent with line 371

modeling/etsiparser does not appear in the gerrit list of repos https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/admin/projects/?filter=modeling

When adding or removing a submodule.... using the steps as referenced below should eliminate or detect inconsistencies such as the above.

Steps for removing submodule
https://stackoverflow.com/questions/1260748/how-do-i-remove-a-submodule

Steps for adding submodule
https://docs.onap.org/en/dublin/guides/onap-developer/how-to-use-docs/include-documentation.html#setup-project-repositories-s

Thanks for the catch Rich, looks like I added the incorrect name, it should all be referring /modeling/etsicatalog and not
/modeling/etsiparser. Will patch this error.
